name: Parmesan-Crumbed Chicken Breast
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons olive oil, or more if needed
1 Tablespoon Butter, or more if needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the breadcrumbs, Parmesan cheese, and minced parsley.
2. In a shallow dish, combine 2 eggs with 2 tablespoons water. Stir lightly.
3. Line a baking sheet with wax paper.
4. Season chicken halves with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Dredge each chicken half in flour, shaking off excess.
6. Dip in the egg wash mixture, letting excess drip off.
7. Coat evenly in the breadcrumb/Parmesan cheese/parsley mixture by pressing.
8. Arrange coated chicken on the prepared baking sheet.
9. Cover loosely and place in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
10. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil with 1 tablespoon butter in a large skillet over moderately high heat.
11. When hot, add chicken pieces in one layer and sauté for 2-3 minutes on each side or until lightly browned and crispy.
12. Lower the heat to medium-low and continue cooking for 4-5 more minutes or until no longer pink in the center and fully cooked through.
13. Drain on paper towels.
14. Serves 6.
